name: IC Markets
description_short: True ECN forex broker with the lowest average spreads in the industry, deep liquidity, and support for MT4/MT5/cTrader.
description_long:
IC Markets (International Capital Markets) is an Australian-based ECN forex and CFD broker consistently ranked among the lowest-cost brokers in the industry. With average EUR/USD spreads as low as 0.02 pips on raw accounts, IC Markets delivers pricing that rivals institutional-level execution.

The broker offers three platform options: MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, and cTrader, each connected to deep liquidity pools from tier-1 banks and non-bank liquidity providers. Raw Spread accounts charge $3.50 per side per lot ($7 round turn) while Standard accounts bundle costs into the spread.

IC Markets is particularly popular among scalpers, algorithmic traders, and high-volume traders due to its fast execution speeds (average under 40ms), no dealing desk interference, and support for all trading styles including hedging and scalping. The broker is regulated by ASIC, CySEC, and FSA.
pros: Lowest average spreads in the industry
True ECN execution with no dealing desk
Supports all trading styles including scalping
cons: Customer support can be slow during peak times
